hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$0" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then .venv/bin/ruff format --quiet "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$0" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]] && [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *src/app/* ]]; then .venv/bin/python .claude/hooks/code_embeddings.py embed "$FILE_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1 & fi; exit 0'

hooks.prompt: Invoke the complexity-check skill at .claude/skills/complexity-check/SKILL.md. Review the Python code changed this turn (use git diff HEAD) for algorithmic complexity concerns, respecting .claude/whitelist.yaml. Output the JSON decision per the skill's format.

Invoke the srp-check skill at .claude/skills/srp-check/SKILL.md. Review the Python code changed this turn for SRP violations, respecting .claude/whitelist.yaml. Output the JSON decision per the skill's format.

Invoke the dry-check skill at .claude/skills/dry-check/SKILL.md. Re-embed changed Python files and query for semantic duplicates. Respect .claude/whitelist.yaml. Output the JSON decision per the skill's format.

Read the engineer skill at .claude/skills/engineer/SKILL.md, the settings at .claude/settings.json, and the code factory skills in .claude/skills/. Compare against the current code structure in src/app/. Flag if: 1) Skills or hooks are stale due to code changes (new pipeline steps, layers, conventions). 2) There's an opportunity to improve factory infrastructure — new templates, skills, or hooks that would help. Respond with {"decision": "block", "reason": "Suggested updates: ..."} for either case. Respond {"decision": "approve"} only if everything is current AND no useful additions are apparent.
